sections.paragraph:
ἐλαία, ας, ἡ

① tree that produces olives, olive tree (Hom.+) Ro 11:17, 24 (a variety of Olea Europaea, Zohary 56f; on the imagery s. Straub 74f); pl. Rv 11:4 (cp. Zech 4:3, 11). τὸ ὄρος τῶν ἐλαιῶν (Zech 14:4; ParJer 9:20; cp. Jos., Bell. 2, 262, Ant. 20, 169; Just., D. 103, 1; 2; 7 [Mt 26:30 par.]) the Mount of Olives, a hill east of Jerusalem and known for its olive trees (Dalman, Orte3 277ff [Eng. tr. 320–27]) Mt 21:1; 24:3; 26:30; Mk 11:1; 13:3; 14:26; Lk 19:37; 22:39; J 8:1. For Lk 19:29; 21:37 s. ἐλαιών.

② fruit of the olive tree, olive (Aristoph., Pla.+; Diosc.; Plut.; PHib 49, 8 [257 b.c.]; PFay 130, 16; POxy 1494, 16) Js 3:12.—Lit., s. ἀγριέλαιος.—B. 380. OEANE IV 179–84. DELG and Frisk. M-M.

Hom Hom , VIII b.c.—List 5

Zohary Zohary = MZ., various works—List 6

Straub Straub = WS., Die Bildersprache des Apostels Paulus—List 6

  1. pl. = plural
  2. cp. = compare, freq. in ref. to citation fr. ancient texts

ParJer ParJer = Paraleipomena Jeremiou, II? a.d.—List 2

Jos. Jos. = Josephus. This abbr. used when follow by title; I a.d.—Lists 5

Just Just , II a.d.—List 5

D D = Didache, except that in a list of manuscripts or as textual variant D refers to Codex Bezae—List 1

par. par. = parallel

Dalman Dalman = GD., various works—List 6

Eng. tr. Eng. tr. = English translation

Aristoph Aristoph , V–IV b.c.—List 5

Pla Pla , V–IV b.c.; s. also Ps.-Plato—List 5

Diosc Diosc , or Dioscurides, I a.d. physician, also Ps.-Dioscorides after I a.d.—List 5

Plut Plut , I–II a.d.—List 5

PHib PHib = The Hibeh Papyri I–II—List 4

PFay PFay = Fayûm Towns and Their Papyri—List 4

POxy POxy = Oxyrhynchus Papyri—List 4

  1. B. = CDBuck, A Dictionary of Selected Synonyms—List 6

OEANE OEANE = Oxford Encyclopedia of Archaeology in the Near East—List 6

DELG DELG = PChantraine, Dictionnaire étymologique de la langue grecque—List 6

Frisk Frisk = HF., Griechisches etymologisches Wörterbuch—List 6

M-M M-M = JMoulton/GMilligan, Vocabulary of Greek Testament—Lists 4, 6

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 313
